programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: As they pick their way through Alabama, Mike and Jersey make a pit stop in historic Selma where Rex and his Aunt Amelia open the doors to their family's massive collection of vintage petroliana.S23E11.

programs.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programs.desc: A horrifying tornado rips through Missouri, wiping out 200 houses a minute. Elsewhere, one man's underwater debacle results in a remarkable rescue.

programs.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programs.desc: The team is unstoppable when more evidence suggests the stone roadway is heading directly towards the Money Pit.
